svg.title: Bathroom memory fragment (apartment four) - polished, sterile, subtly uncanny
svg.desc: Looking straight at the bathroom mirror over the sink counter. The mirror is large, polished, and centered; its frame is matte charcoal. Inside it, the room behind the camera reflects back: a cool wall, a hint of a doorway with a sliver of warm hall light, a small framed print, a wall-mounted towel ring with a folded towel, and a thin reflected ceiling light. Along the lower interior of the mirror, ghost-pale reflections of the counter toiletries float at impossible heights, mirrored left-to-right. On the counter itself, against the backsplash: a slim brass soap dispenser, a small folded hand towel, a glass tumbler with a single toothbrush, a ceramic dish with a sage bar of soap, and a tiny white vase with a sprig of eucalyptus. The faucet is wall-mounted; a single perfectly formed water drop hangs from its tip and never falls. Lighting is even and cool. There is no condensation. Nothing animates.
